rulings.Case Title: PAUL WESTBROOK et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 4, 2009, line 3, DEFENDANT DOWMAN PRODUCTS, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendant shifts the burden and Motion for Summary Judgment is granted. Plaintiff fails to raise a triable issue of material fact. Objection to Lewis testimony is overruled. (Evidence Code section 240(a)(5).) Objection to testimony of Wellington, Dowds, and opinion testimony of Ay is sustained. No evidence that plaintiff is exposed to asbesetos containing FIXALL when remodeling work performed in 1972. =(302/CWW/JW)

rulings.Case Title: NAOMI CAROLINO-AU DDS VS. PHUONG NGUYEN DDS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Phuong Nguyen'S Demurrer To Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 4, 2009, line 14, Defendant Phuong Nguyen's Demurrer to Complaint. Demurrer is sustained in part, and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to 9th cause of action. No reasonable possibility that plaintiff can state a cause of action. Demurrer is overruled as to the 8th cause of action. The Court declines to interpret the non-compete clause at this early stage to determine whether plaintiff's claim fails. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: NAOMI CAROLINO-AU DDS VS. PHUONG NGUYEN DDS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff Naomi Carolino-Au'S Motion For Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 4, 2009, line 14, Plaintiff Naomi Carolino-Au's Motion for Preliminary Injunction. Motion for preliminary injunction is denied. Plaintiff fails to show a reasonable probability of success on the merits of her contract claim for Breach of Covenant not to compete. Ambiguity whether covenant encompasses two geographic locations or just the City and County of San Francisco. Judicial notice is granted as to address of San Bruno office and denied as to Google map and National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration memo. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: NAOMI CAROLINO-AU DDS VS. PHUONG NGUYEN DDS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Phuong Nguyen'S Motion To Strike Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 4, 2009, line 14, Defendant Phuong Nguyen's Motion to Strike Complaint. Motion to strike is grantd in part, as to paragraph 6 with ten days leave to amend. Motion is denied as to remaining issues. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MORTON MAZAHERI, MD VS. MEDICAL BOARD OF CALIFORNIA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 4, 2009, line 12, PETITIONER MORTON MAZAHERI'S, Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate. Petition for Writ is denied. Petitioner was properly served and defaulted by failing to appear. Respondent complied with Government Code section 11520. The agency took action based upon competent expert affidavits. =(302/CWW/PB)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. DONNISHA M HARRELL et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, June 4, 2009, line 11, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Motion for summary judgment is denied. Plaintiff shifts the burden of proof. Defendant raises a triable issue of fact whether the San Francisco Housing Authority has established good cause to evict defendant. Motion for summary adjudication is granted. The Breach of Warranty of Habitability and Failure to Provide a Grievance Hearing are inapplicable and meritless affirmative defenses in this action. Defendant is barred from raising or attempting to introduce evidence in reference to these affirmative defenses. =(302/CWW)
